categories.name: Articles & Books
categories.summary: Essays and long-form writing making the case for confederation, from scholars and policymakers.

categories.name: Background Papers
categories.summary: The Background Papers provide a practical, policy-oriented analysis of comparative global models. By examining the benefits and liabilities of these frameworks, the Papers help the working groups identify successful strategies that could be adapted for a Shared Homeland paradigm. This comparative foundation is essential for moving beyond theory to understand how such models might eventually be implemented in Palestine-Israel.

categories.name: Podcasts
categories.summary: Audio conversations and interviews exploring confederal and partnership-based ideas with leading thinkers in the field.

categories.name: Policy Reports
categories.summary: A selection of in-depth proposals and frameworks on the confederal model from research institutes and think tanks.

categories.name: Videos & Events
categories.summary: Recorded talks, panels, interviews, and public events featuring researchers, practitioners, and our partner organisation.
